title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 07 2026
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Midage Supramax values dipped in response to soft pricing for the Livita,while older tonnage firmed in response to the sale of the VW Trust to Chinese buyers. Kamsarmax AC Youth (82,600 DWT, 2007, Tadotsu Tsuneishi) sold by Glorious Youth Shipping for USD 15 mil, VV Value USD 14.3 mil. Ultramax Livita (63,500 DWT, 2017, Shin Kasado Dock) sold to Greek buyers for USD 30.5 mil, VV Value USD 30.6 mil.
